analyst_briefing: No capability tier changes recommended across six frontier labs/systems: all hold at stable posture due to confirmed absence of new model releases or independently verified advances (I1, weekly_capability_tier_tracker). Benchmark saturation persists without 2+ source corroboration. Regulatory milestones on_track: EU AI Act standards vacuum active pre-August 2026 high-risk deadline (I2, durable legislation); US EO 14110 stable (revocable executive_order); UK/China no changes. Risk vectors show match on Standards Vacuum (I2 EU) reinforcing prior HIGH rating; no_match on Governance Fragmentation, Cyber Escalation, Disinfo Velocity absent incidents (I3, I6). No lab posture shifts or safety incidents (I3). ESA escalation MEDIUM on EU standards gap; ERM LOW on stable energy signals (I5). No contested findings. Capability-governance velocity gap unchanged: quiet week signals refinement phase, not deceleration; monitor for Q2 release cycle.
